시편 55:1.content: Listen to my prayer, God. Don’t hide yourself from my supplication.

시편 55:2.content: Attend to me, and answer me. I am restless in my complaint, and moan

시편 55:3.content: because of the voice of the enemy, because of the oppression of the wicked. For they bring suffering on me. In anger they hold a grudge against me.

시편 55:4.content: My heart is severely pained within me. The terrors of death have fallen on me.

시편 55:5.content: Fearfulness and trembling have come on me. Horror has overwhelmed me.

시편 55:6.content: I said, “Oh that I had wings like a dove! Then I would fly away, and be at rest.

시편 55:7.content: Behold, then I would wander far off. I would lodge in the wilderness.”

시편 55:8.content: “I would hurry to a shelter from the stormy wind and storm.”

시편 55:9.content: Confuse them, Lord, and confound their language, for I have seen violence and strife in the city.

시편 55:10.content: Day and night they prowl around on its walls. Malice and abuse are also within her.

시편 55:11.content: Destructive forces are within her. Threats and lies don’t depart from her streets.

시편 55:12.content: For it was not an enemy who insulted me, then I could have endured it. Neither was it he who hated me who raised himself up against me, then I would have hidden myself from him.

시편 55:13.content: But it was you, a man like me, my companion, and my familiar friend.

시편 55:14.content: We took sweet fellowship together. We walked in God’s house with company.

시편 55:15.content: Let death come suddenly on them. Let them go down alive into Sheol. For wickedness is among them, in their dwelling.

시편 55:16.content: As for me, I will call on God. Yahweh will save me.

시편 55:17.content: Evening, morning, and at noon, I will cry out in distress. He will hear my voice.

시편 55:18.content: He has redeemed my soul in peace from the battle that was against me, although there are many who oppose me.

시편 55:19.content: God, who is enthroned forever, will hear and answer them. They never change, who don’t fear God.

시편 55:20.content: He raises his hands against his friends. He has violated his covenant.

시편 55:21.content: His mouth was smooth as butter, but his heart was war. His words were softer than oil, yet they were drawn swords.

시편 55:22.content: Cast your burden on Yahweh and he will sustain you. He will never allow the righteous to be moved.

시편 55:23.content: But you, God, will bring them down into the pit of destruction. Bloodthirsty and deceitful men shall not live out half their days, but I will trust in you.
